title: Everything You Need to Know About Transaction Logs for Digital Product Sales — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, trying to sell ebooks, courses, or templates without PayPal or Stripe is like trying to build a house on shaky ground. You need a solid foundation to collect payments, track sales, and deliver your products reliably. But many platforms and payment processors restrict certain countries or require KYC, making it difficult to get started. This post is designed to help you overcome those obstacles and take control of your digital product sales.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Transaction logs for digital product sales are a record of every order, payment, and delivery made on your platform. It's a critical component of selling digital goods, as it allows you to track your sales, manage orders, and gain valuable insights into customer behavior. Without transaction logs, you're flying blind, unable to see what's working and what's not. With the Admin Dashboard, you can see every order, every payment, and every delivery from anywhere in the world.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Admin Dashboard uses blockchain technology to create a transparent and tamper-proof record of every transaction. When a customer makes a purchase, the payment is verified and stored on the blockchain, creating a permanent and immutable record. This record is then linked to the customer's order, allowing you to track the entire sales process from start to finish. The Admin Dashboard also provides real-time analytics, so you can see what's working and what's not in real-time.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Admin Dashboard is built for digital creators who need to sell products without the restrictions of PayPal or Stripe. If you're based in a country with limited payment options or you're looking for a more transparent and secure way to collect payments, the Admin Dashboard is the perfect solution. It's also ideal for solo developers building crypto-native digital product stores, as it provides a comprehensive set of tools to manage sales and customer data.
Transaction logs are the backbone of any digital product sales platform.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Admin Dashboard is a comprehensive tool that combines transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics into a single platform. It works seamlessly with the Shop Engine, which provides automated delivery and payment verification. The Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration also connects to the Admin Dashboard, providing a secure and convenient way for customers to make payments. Together, these components create a robust and reliable platform for selling digital products.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with the Admin Dashboard, sign up for an account and connect your Shop Engine. Then, configure your payment settings and start selling your digital products. Use the transaction logs to track your sales and customer behavior, and use the order management tools to manage your orders and customer data. With the Admin Dashboard, you can take control of your digital product sales and focus on what matters most – creating great products and building a loyal customer base.
